ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "fips_code" TEXT /* FIPS code of the county */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the county is located */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the county */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the county */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year range */,
  "year_range" TEXT /* Year range of the data (e.g., 2015-2019) */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Start year of the year range */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* End year of the year range */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_ethnicity" (
  "race_ethnicity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race/ethnicity category */,
  "race_ethnicity_name" TEXT /* Name of the race/ethnicity category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the race/ethnicity category */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the race/ethnicity (e.g., Asian, Black, Hispanic, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_ethnicity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tenure" (
  "tenure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tenure type */,
  "tenure_name" TEXT /* Name of the tenure type (e.g., Owner Occupied, Renter Occupied) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tenure type */,
  "subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the tenure type (e.g., Owner Occupied - Mortgaged, Owner Occupied - Not Mortgaged, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tenure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measure_types" (
  "measure_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measure type */,
  "measure_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the measure type (e.g., Number, Percent of Total Housing Units) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measure type */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the measure type (e.g., Number, Percentage, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measure_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variables" (
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variable */,
  "variable_name" TEXT /* Name of the variable (e.g., Occupied Housing Units, Margins of Error) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the variable */,
  "subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the variable (e.g., Occupied Housing Units - Total, Occupied Housing Units - Owner Occupied, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variable_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "housing_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where the data is collected */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year of the data */,
  "race_ethnicity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the race/ethnicity category */,
  "tenure_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tenure type (e.g., Owner Occupied, Renter Occupied) */,
  "measure_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the measure type (e.g., Number, Percent of Total Housing Units) */,
  "variable" TEXT /* Variable name for the data point */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the data point */,
  "margin_of_error" REAL /* Margin of error for the data point */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Data collection method used for the data entry */,
  "collection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection for the data entry */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data entry */,
  "data_note" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_housing_data_variable FOREIGN KEY ("variable") REFERENCES variables ("variable_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_housing_data_tenure_id FOREIGN KEY ("tenure_id") REFERENCES tenure ("tenure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_housing_data_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_housing_data_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_housing_data_race_ethnicity_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_ethnicity_id") REFERENCES race_ethnicity ("race_ethnicity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_housing_data_measure_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("measure_type_id") REFERENCES measure_types ("measure_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data entry was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES housing_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the data file (e.g., CSV, Excel, etc.) */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., CSV - Comma Separated, Excel - XLSX, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES housing_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., Summary, Detailed, etc.) */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, Excel, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_file_path FOREIGN KEY ("file_path") REFERENCES data_files ("file_path")
)
